description: Introduction to applications of data science in materials science and engineering, including understanding the creation and use of modern data resources, data-centric approaches to materials, and the integration of machine learning across the materials landscape.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Satisfied Quantitative Reasoning (QR) B requirement, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Satisfied Quantitative Reasoning (QR) B requirement, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
